summary: Backend-only verification of the OG (Open Graph) fix for WhatsApp/social-bot sharing. All 13 pytest cases passed (100%). Verified /api/og/{slug} returns 200 + HTML with correct og:title 'Passported out' and og:image pointing at /api/og-image/{slug} across WhatsApp, facebookexternalhit, Twitterbot, LinkedInBot, Slackbot and browser UAs. Confirmed unknown slug returns 200 with site-default OG meta (NEVER a 301/302 — would cause infinite loop with the new Vercel UA rewrite). Dynamic /api/og-image/{slug} returns a real 1200x630 PNG (>50KB, valid PNG header). Sitemap (>=12 <url> entries) and robots.txt (correct Sitemap line) verified. vercel.json parses as valid JSON and contains the bot-UA rewrite to https://stateofplay-backend.onrender.com/api/og/:slug with all required bot signatures (whatsapp, facebookexternalhit, twitterbot, linkedinbot, slackbot). OG endpoint does not touch Mongo.
passed_tests: /api/og/{real-slug} with facebookexternalhit UA -> 200 + correct OG meta
/api/og/{real-slug} with Twitterbot UA -> 200 + correct OG meta
/api/og/{real-slug} with LinkedInBot UA -> 200 + correct OG meta
/api/og/{real-slug} with Slackbot UA -> 200 + correct OG meta
/api/og/{real-slug} with regular Chrome browser UA -> 200 (backend bot-detection deliberately removed)
/api/og/this-slug-does-not-exist-1234 with WhatsApp UA -> 200 with site-default OG meta (CRITICAL no-redirect behaviour confirmed)
/api/og-image/{real-slug} -> 200, content-type image/png, 50KB+, valid PNG magic bytes
/app/frontend/vercel.json -> valid JSON, contains UA-bot rewrite with whatsapp/facebookexternalhit/twitterbot/linkedinbot/slackbot to /api/og/:slug
critical_code_review_comments: Code is clean. /api/og/{slug} correctly falls through to site-default OG meta on Ghost failure without redirecting — exactly what the fix required. Try/except wraps the Ghost lookup; defaults are set before the try block so any exception path still yields a valid 200 HTML response.

Minor: /api/og-image/{slug} falls back to a hard-coded Ghost CDN image URL on exception (302 redirect). This is acceptable but worth noting — if the Ghost CDN image is ever removed, the fallback will break. Consider serving a static bundled PNG asset instead for true zero-dependency fallback. Not blocking for this fix.

/api/og/{slug} response does not set X-Robots-Tag or noindex; since only bots reached by Vercel UA rewrite will see this minimal HTML, consider adding 'X-Robots-Tag: noindex' to avoid the OG endpoint itself being indexed (e.g. by Googlebot which is in the UA list). Optional polish.
seed_data_creation: None — used real Ghost slug pio-oci-aiff-sports-passport.
context_for_next_testing_agent: OG fix verified end-to-end on the backend. The only remaining validation is the Vercel rewrite itself, which can only be tested in production after deploy (curl with WhatsApp UA against https://www.stateofplay.club/{slug}). Real Ghost slug for retesting: pio-oci-aiff-sports-passport (title 'Passported out'). Test file at /app/backend/tests/test_og_endpoints.py runs in ~4s and is safe to re-run as regression. Note: BASE_URL is read from REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL env var — pytest run must export it (it's already in /app/frontend/.env but not in the shell by default).
